lingala.metallic_fm_bell_tone: Lokito ya FM bell ya ebende
lingala.deep_808_style_sub_bass: Sub bass ya mozindo ya style 808
lingala.barry_harris_1929_2021_codified_bebop_: Barry Harris (1929-2021) abongisaki harmony ya bebop na système. Système na ye esalelaka 6th chords na esika ya 7ths mpe ebakisaka diminished passing chords kati ya ba degré ya scale mpo na kotambwisa mongongo malamu.
lingala.attack_time_to_reach_full_volume_decay: Attack: ntango ya kokóma na volume mobimba. Decay: ntango ya kokita na sustain. Sustain: niveau ya volume oyo esimbami. Release: ntango ya kolimwa nsima ya kotika key.
lingala.a_scale_is_an_ordered_set_of_pitches_m: Scale ezali lisangá ya ba pitch oyo ebongisami. Modes ezali ba rotation ya scale oyo ebandi na ba degré ekeseni. Moko na moko esalaka humeur ya mayoki ekeseni.
lingala.chords_are_built_by_stacking_intervals: Ba chord etongamaka na kotanda ba interval (ba 3rd). Major esalelaka major 3rd + minor 3rd. Minor ebalolaka yango. Extended chords ebakisaka 7ths, 9ths, mpe koleka.
lingala.kicks_use_a_sine_oscillator_with_a_pit: Ba kick esalelaka sine oscillator na pitch sweep. Ba snare esangisaka noise (efiltrami) + tone body. Ba hi-hat esalelaka high-pass filtered noise bursts.
lingala.4_4_4_quarter_note_beats_per_bar_most_: 4/4 = ba quarter-note beat 4 na bar moko (oyo eleki komonana). 3/4 = ndenge ya waltz. 6/8 = compound duple. 5/4 na 7/8 esalaka ba groove ya asymétrie, ya bapaya.
lingala.keys_arranged_by_ascending_5ths_clockw: Ba key ebongisami na ba 5th oyo ezali komata na sens ya montre. Ba key ya pembeni ekabolaka ba note 6 na 7. Kokende na sens ya montre ebakisaka ba sharp; contre-sens ebakisaka ba flat.
lingala.every_musical_sound_contains_overtones: Lokito nyonso ya miziki ezali na ba overtone likolo ya fundamental. Makasi na yango relative ekataka timbre — yango wana trompette eyokanaka ndenge mosusu na flûte na pitch moko.
lingala.an_interval_is_the_distance_between_tw: Interval ezali ntaka kati ya ba pitch mibale, oyo emekami na ba semitone. Ratio ya fréquence ekataka consonance (ba ratio ya pete lokola 3:2 eyokanaka malamu).
lingala.plays_chord_notes_one_at_a_time_in_seq: Ebetaka ba note ya chord moko-moko na molongo. Likolo = uta na se tii likolo, Se = uta likolo tii na se. Esalaka ba pattern oyo ezali kotiyola uta na ba chord oyo etélémi.
lingala.a_filter_removes_frequencies_above_low: Filter elongolaka ba fréquence oyo ezali likolo (lowpass), na se (highpass), to zingazinga (bandpass) ya cutoff frequency. Resonance (Q) ebakisaka ba fréquence pene na cutoff, esalaka peak.
lingala.tremolo_periodic_volume_changes_amplit: Tremolo: mbongwana ya volume ya ntango na ntango (amplitude modulation). Vibrato: mbongwana ya pitch ya ntango na ntango (frequency modulation). Nyonso mibale etambwisami na LFO (Low Frequency Oscillator).
lingala.discovered_in_1983_a_noise_burst_feeds: Emonanaki na 1983. Noise burst ekotaka na delay line ya mokuse mpenza oyo ezali na feedback. Delay time ekataka pitch. Filter na kati ya feedback loop etambwisaka pole mpe decay. Emekolaka plucked strings na ndenge ya bomoto.
lingala.the_sequencer_is_a_composition_tool_ea: Sequencer ezali esaleli ya composition. Step moko na moko emonisaka subdivision ya beat. Molongo ya melody etyaka pitched notes, ba drum ebakisaka rythme. Musical notation emonisaka oyo osalaka.
lingala.notes_on_lines_and_spaces_represent_pi: Ba note na ba ligne mpe ba espace emonisaka ba pitch. Durée emonisami na forme ya note: whole (○), half (𝅗𝅥), quarter (♩), eighth (♪). Staff ezali na ba ligne 5.
lingala.equal_temperament_12_notes_per_octave_: Equal temperament: ba note 12 na octave, ratio 2^(1/12). A4 = 440 Hz; A5 = 880 Hz. Well-Tempered Clavier ya Bach (1722) endimisaki mokili na compromis oyo. Note nyonso oyo obetaka awa ezali na grid wana.
lingala.major_w_w_h_w_w_w_h_minor_w_h_w_w_h_w_: Major: W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Minor: W-H-W-W-H-W-W. Ba mode 7 (Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian) eutaka na kobalola interval pattern ya major scale.
lingala.chords_stacked_thirds_inversions: Chords — ba third etandami + ba inversion
lingala.triads_root_third_fifth_major_4_3_semi: Ba triad: root + third + fifth. Major (4+3 ba semitone), minor (3+4), diminished (3+3), augmented (4+4). Ba 7th chord ebakisaka third mosusu. Miziki pop = ~ba chord 6 oyo ezongelaka; jazz esalelaka ba extension mpe ba substitution.
lingala.sustained_chord_textures_the_bed_under: Sustained chord textures — mbeto na se ya pene na score nyonso ya cinéma. Meka iv-V-i na minor, to i-VI-VII mpo na humeur ya Hans Zimmer. Ba drone na ba fifth esimbaka miziki classique ya Inde mpe ba tradition ya bagpipe.
lingala.most_popular_music_sits_at_4_4_90_130_: Miziki mingi ya lokumu ezali na 4/4, 90-130 BPM. Hip-hop ~85-95, house 120-130, drum-and-bass ~170 (ndenge ya half-time). Kick na 1+3, snare na 2+4 = backbeat — moboko ya rock + pop.
lingala.pythagoras_500_bce_discovered_consonan: Pythagore (~500 BCE) amonaki consonance uta na ba ratio ya fréquence ya mibalisa: octave 2:1, fifth 3:2, fourth 4:3. Helmholtz apanzaki yango na 1862. Lokito = ba mbonge ya compression; miziki = ba pattern oyo tondimani kobenga kitoko.
lingala.full_chord_grid_strum_plate_and_voice_: Chord grid mobimba, strum plate, mpe voice presets
lingala.drag_across_strings_to_strum: Benda na ba string mpo na kostrum!
lingala.frequency_modulation_fm_synthesis_uses: Frequency Modulation (FM) synthesis esalelaka oscillator moko (modulator) mpo na kobongola fréquence ya mosusu (carrier) noki. Ratio modulator:carrier ekataka harmonic content. Ba ratio ya pete (1:1, 2:1, 3:1) esalaka harmonic tones. Ba ratio ya mindondo esalaka metallic, bell-like, to inharmonic sounds. Yamaha DX7 ekomisaki FM lokumu na 1983.
lingala.supersaw_stacks_multiple_sawtooth_osci: SuperSaw etandaka ba sawtooth oscillator ebele oyo edetune moke-moke moko na mosusu. Yango esalaka lokito ya monene, ya monene, oyo ezali kongenga — elembo ya EDM, trance, mpe pop ya sika. Ba voice mingi = ya monene kasi esalelaka CPU mingi. Detuning etambwisaka ndenge ba voice ezali mosika na tuning — detune mingi = ya monene/lokola chorus mingi, moke = ya makasi/ya kotala mingi.
lingala.an_arpeggiator_plays_the_notes_of_a_ch: 🔬 Arpeggiator ebetaka ba note ya chord moko-moko na molongo. "Likolo" ekendaka uta na se tii likolo, esalaka nguya oyo ezali komata. "Se" ekitaka mpo na ndenge ya kokweya ya mai. Mbangu etambwisaka mbangu (moke = noki). Gate etambwisaka boumeli oyo note moko na moko elelaka (100% = legato, 10% = staccato). Meka mbangu=100ms + ba octave 4 + up pattern mpo na classic trance arp!
lingala.sing_speak_or_play_an_instrument_hear_: Yemba, loba, to beta instrument — yoka effects na temps réel!
lingala.monitor_hear_yourself_use_headphones: 🔊 Monitor (yoka yo moko — salela ba casque!)
lingala.removes_frequencies_above_lowpass_or_b: Elongolaka ba fréquence oyo ezali likolo (lowpass) to na se (highpass) ya seuil. Lokola kofunga monoko na loboko — ba fréquence ya likolo elimwaka, lokito ekomaka "molili" mingi.
lingala.creates_echoes_by_copying_the_signal_a: Esalaka ba echo na kokopie signal mpe kobeta yango lisusu nsima ya ntango moke. Feedback etambwisaka motango ya ba echo oyo ezongelaka.
lingala.simulates_room_acoustics_by_creating_t: Emekolaka acoustique ya shambre na kosala ba echo mikemike nkoto oyo esanganaka. Shambre moke = reverb ya mokuse, cathédrale = reverb ya molai.
lingala.clips_the_waveform_peaks_turning_smoot: Ekataka ba peak ya waveform, ebongolaka ba sine wave ya kitoko na ba forme ya makasi, ya ba coin. Yango ebakisaka ba harmonic ya sika oyo ezalaki te na lokito ya ebandeli.
lingala.duplicates_the_signal_with_a_slight_co: Ekopie signal na delay moke oyo ezali kobongwana ntango nyonso. Yango emekolaka ba voice/instrument ebele oyo ezali kobeta esika moko na botiki moke.
lingala.rapidly_varies_the_volume_up_and_down_: Ebongolaka volume likolo mpe na se noki, esalaka effet ya kobeta. Ezali komonana na guitare surf mpe miziki ya orgue.
lingala.use_headphones_when_monitoring_to_avoi: Salela ba casque tango ozali komonitorer mpo na koboya feedback loops! Mic elekaka na effects nyonso ya likolo (filter, delay, reverb, bnk.) — bongisa yango mpo na koyoka ndenge moko na moko ebongolaka mongongo to instrument na yo.
lingala.connect_your_microphone_to_run_your_vo: Kangisa microphone na yo mpo na kotambwisa mongongo to instrument na yo na effects chain na temps réel.
lingala.see_your_voice_as_a_waveform_frequency: Mona mongongo na yo lokola waveform + frequency spectrum. Yoka ndenge filter, delay, reverb, distortion, mpe chorus ebongolaka sound waves na nzoto.
lingala.touch_drag_x_pitch_y_filter_effect: Simba & benda — X = pitch, Y = filter/effect
lingala.the_xy_pad_maps_your_finger_mouse_posi: XY pad ekomaka esika ya mosapi/souris na yo na ba paramètre ya miziki na temps réel. X axis etambwisaka pitch (mwasi = se, mobali = likolo). Y axis etambwisaka filter cutoff frequency (likolo = pole, se = molili). Yango ekokani na ba instrument lokola Korg Kaoss Pad, oyo ebongolaki live electronic music performance na kobongola 2D gestures na lokito.
lingala.xy_performance_pad_left_right_is_pitch: XY performance pad. Loboko ya mwasi–ya mobali ezali pitch, likolo–se ezali filter brightness. Salela ba arrow key mpo na kotambola mpe kobeta note; finá Escape to Space mpo na kotelemisa.
lingala.sequencer_drum_pads_notation_samples_m: Sequencer, drum pads, notation, samples & mingi →
lingala.tags_between_notes: Ba tag kati ya ba note:
lingala.tap_pads_to_place_beats: Simba pads mpo na kotia beats
lingala.pattern_length_in_steps: Bolai ya pattern na ba step
lingala.click_cells_to_place_notes_visual_melo: Finá cells mpo na kotia notes — visual melody editor
lingala.common_progressions_click_to_hear: Ba progression ya momesano — finá mpo na koyoka
lingala.chord_progressions_create_emotional_jo: Chord progressions esalaka ba mobembo ya mayoki. Chord I (tonic) eyokanaka lokola 'ndako.' Chord V (dominant) esalaka tension oyo elingi kozonga na I. Chord vi (relative minor) ebakisaka mawa to bozindo. Chord IV (subdominant) elongwaka na ndako na boboto. Bakanisi ete progression I-V-vi-IV emonanaka na koleka 70% ya banzembo ya pop mpo ete ebongisaka mayoki oyo malamu mpenza.
lingala.roman_numerals_i_ii_iii_iv_v_vi_vii_re: Ba nimero ya Roma (I, ii, iii, IV, V, vi, vii°) emonisaka ba degré ya scale. Lettre monene = major chord. Lettre moke = minor chord.
lingala.click_notes_to_hear_them: Finá notes mpo na koyoka yango!
lingala.add_melody_notes_in_the_grid_above: Bakisa melody notes na grid ya likolo ↑
lingala.click_melody_cells_in_the_grid_above_t: Finá melody cells na grid ya likolo mpo na komona notation awa
lingala.held_for_half_a_bar: Esimbami mpo na ndambo ya bar
lingala.click_challenge_me_to_practice_rhythm_: Finá "Meka ngai!" mpo na komeka ba rhythm patterns
lingala.upload_wav_mp3_files_for_custom_pads_s: Téléversé ba fichier WAV/MP3 mpo na custom pads. Samples elongwaka tango ozali kobongola page.
lingala.chain_patterns_into_a_full_song: Kangisa ba pattern na nzembo mobimba
lingala.add_current_pattern_as_a_section: Bakisa pattern ya sikoyo lokola section
lingala.add_current_as_section: + Bakisa Oyo ya Sikoyo lokola Section
lingala.create_a_drum_pattern_in_the_grid_abov: Sala drum pattern na grid ya likolo, na sima finá "+ Bakisa Oyo ya Sikoyo lokola Section" mpo na kobanda kotonga nzembo.
lingala.sections_intro_verse_chorus_bridge_cho: Sections: Intro → Verse → Chorus → Bridge → Chorus → Outro
lingala.no_saved_beats_yet_create_a_pattern_an: Naino beats ebombami te. Sala pattern mpe finá Bomba!
lingala.harmonypad_creates_warm_pure_tones_by_: HarmonyPad esalaka warm, tones ya peto na kosangisa ba sine mpe triangle waves. Pona voice, kamata chord na grid ya se, na sima strum plate!
lingala.chord_grid_tap_to_select_space_to_stru: 🎶 Chord Grid — simba mpo na kopona, Space mpo na kostrum
lingala.strum_plate_tap_or_drag_across: 🎸 Strum Plate — simba to benda likolo
lingala.hear_see_the_waveform_and_learn_the_st: Yoka, mona waveform, mpe yekola lisolo ya instrument moko na moko
lingala.this_is_how_different_instruments_get_: Tala ndenge ba instrument ekeseni ezwaka lokito na yango ya sipesiale! Flûte ezali mingi harmonic 1 (sine). Clarinette ezali na ba harmonic ya bilili (1,3,5,7). Violon ezali na nyonso. Finá mpo na kotonga timbre na yo moko!
lingala.karplus_strong_synthesis_creates_reali: Karplus-Strong synthesis esalaka ba lokito ya solo ya plucked string na kosalela noise burst ya mokuse oyo etindami na delay line na filtered feedback. Bongisa brightness (langi ya noise ya ebandeli) mpe damping (bolai ya sustain) mpo na kosala caractère ya string.
lingala.identify_each_note_in_the_4_note_melod: Yeba note moko na moko na melody ya note 4:
lingala.strong_high_harmonics_pierces_sparkles: High harmonics ya makasi — etobolaka / engengaka.
lingala.fundamental_heavy_gentle_highs_acousti: Fundamental ya kilo, ba highs ya boboto. Lokola acoustic.
lingala.mid_heavy_without_fundamental_woody_cu: Mid ya kilo kozanga fundamental — lokola nzete/cuckoo flute.
lingala.almost_pure_fundamental_muffled_sub_li: Pene ya pure fundamental — ekangami / lokola sub.
lingala.roughly_equal_harmonics_full_natural_t: Ba harmonic pene ekokani — mobimba / timbre ya bomoto.
lingala.adjust_fundamental_mid_and_high_harmon: Bongisa ba niveau ya harmonic ya fundamental, mid, mpe high. Widget ekabolaka lokito na moko ya ba timbre mitano ekeseni. Score te, komonisa te — kaka sweep mpe tala.
lingala.hypothesis_free_text_which_harmonic_le: Hypothèse (texte libre): Harmonic level nini ekataka "pole" na "warm"?
lingala.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Okangami — lakisa ba prompt ya polele
lingala.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Simba ba slider mibale makasi. Ningisa moko. Tala.
lingala.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Luka ba réglage mibale oyo esalaka timbre moko. Ba proportion nini ekabolaka?
lingala.real_instruments_have_characteristic_s: Ba instrument ya solo ezali na ba spectra ya sipesiale. Luka ntina flûte eyokanaka ndenge mosusu na violon.
lingala.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Nasosoli — limbola na maloba na ngai
lingala.explain_how_harmonic_content_determine: Limbola ndenge harmonic content ekataka bomoni ya timbre.
lingala.design_note_discrete_5_class_timbre_ma: Note ya design: timbre marker ya classe 5 ekeseni; acoustic fidelity score te; komonisa te — na mokano.
lingala.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: na kosalela maloba ya mokolo na mokolo ya pete mpe ba phrase ya mokuse, kozanga jargon
lingala.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: mpo na moyekoli ya kelasi 5, na mokuse mpe na boninga
lingala.for_a_student_who_already_knows_some_m: mpo na moyekoli oyo ayebi déjà mwa music theory
lingala.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: Finá "Limbola" mpo AI tutor alimbola oyo view oyo eteyaka na niveau ya kotanga oyo oponi.
lingala.harmonic_series_why_instruments_sound_: 🎵 Harmonic Series — Ntina ba instrument eyokanaka ndenge mosusu
